initial_files.specspine/payments.md:
# Payments

Payment navigation. [Settlement](settlement.md) owns settlement outcomes.
initial_files.specspine/settlement.md:
# Settlement

Owns provider settlement boundaries. [Retry policy](retry-policy.md) canonically owns provider-timeout retry delay.
initial_files.specspine/retry-policy.md:
# Retry policy

Canonically owns retry delay after provider timeouts.

<!-- specspine:semantic-ids:begin -->
## Constraints

- **CON-provider-timeout-delay** — Provider-timeout retries must remain delayed rather than immediate.

## Open questions

- **OQ-provider-timeout-delay-duration** — The accepted delay duration remains unresolved.
<!-- specspine:semantic-ids:end -->
